Function.Inference: Intro section, establishing the rhythm before the Segno.
Main loop body from Segno to D.S., ending at fine on stop.

Section.Inference: Introductory rhythmic accompaniment before the main loop.
Theme A, groove starts at S, melody enters at bar 9.
Theme B, a contrasting forte section with new motifs.
Return of the second half of Theme A, developed.
Theme C, a new melody ending at fine and a ||.
Non-thematic 4-bar vamp (identical to bars 5-8) to Segno.
